src: pandas on AWS - Easy integration with Athena, Glue, Redshift, Timestream, Neptune, OpenSearch, QuickSight, Chime, CloudWatchLogs, DynamoDB, EMR, SecretManager, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLServer and S3 (Parquet, CSV, JSON and EXCEL).
ja: AWS 上の pandas — Athena、Glue、Redshift、Timestream、Neptune、OpenSearch、QuickSight、Chime、CloudWatchLogs、DynamoDB、EMR、SecretManager、PostgreSQL、MySQL、SQLServer、S3（Parquet・CSV・JSON・EXCEL）と簡単に統合。
